# Tuned Yota

> Toyota & Lexus performance tuning (OTT Tune calibration) and Magnuson supercharger sales, installation, and calibration across the Upper Midwest (Minnesota, Iowa, Wisconsin, North Dakota, South Dakota, Nebraska).

Tuned Yota is an authorized **OTT (Overland Tailor Tune) installer** and the Midwest's authorized **Magnuson Supercharger dealer** (kits drop-shipped anywhere in the lower 48). Calibrations are built by a licensed **VFTuner PRO Tuner**. Every calibration keeps factory emissions fully intact, is verified with a 5-gas analyzer, and is EPA-compliant — no check-engine-light defeat, no off-road-only tuning.

- Tagline: Undeniable Performance
- Phone / text: (612) 406-7117
- Email: info@tunedyota.com
- Service model: in-person tuning at events across the Upper Midwest (no single storefront)

## Key pages
- [Home](https://tunedyota.com/): overview of Tuned Yota's OTT tuning and services.
- [Find Your Exact Tune](https://tunedyota.com/find-your-exact-tune): interactive tool to pick your vehicle, see calibration options and starting price, and request a booking tied to your nearest event market.
- [What is the OTT Tune?](https://tunedyota.com/ott-tune): explanation of OTT calibration, what it fixes (gear hunting, throttle lag, lazy shifting), and verified YouTube reviews.
- [Superchargers](https://tunedyota.com/supercharger): Magnuson supercharger sales, install, and calibration; supported vehicles and pricing.
- [OTT Tune cost](https://tunedyota.com/ott-tune-cost): what an OTT Tune costs and what drives the price by platform.
- [Is the OTT Tune worth it?](https://tunedyota.com/is-the-ott-tune-worth-it): the value case with real Dynojet before/after results.
- [Tune warranty & emissions legality](https://tunedyota.com/tune-warranty-emissions-legality): Magnuson-Moss warranty protection, EPA/emissions compliance, and why the tune is street-legal.
- [Magnuson supercharger guide](https://tunedyota.com/magnuson-supercharger-guide): supported platforms, dyno-proven horsepower/torque gains, and pricing guidance.
- [Magnuson supercharger pricing & instant quote](https://tunedyota.com/magnuson-supercharger-pricing): every current Magnuson kit price, an interactive quote builder, and online reservation.
- [Toyota Tundra supercharger](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-tundra-supercharger) · [Tacoma](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-tacoma-supercharger) · [4Runner](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-4runner-supercharger) · [FJ Cruiser](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-fj-cruiser-supercharger) · [Land Cruiser](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-land-cruiser-supercharger) · [Lexus LX570](https://tunedyota.com/lexus-lx570-supercharger) · [Sequoia](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-sequoia-supercharger): per-vehicle Magnuson kit price, horsepower, and CARB legality.
- [AMSOIL Garage](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-garage): buy the exact AMSOIL synthetic fluids for your Toyota or Lexus — motor oil, filters, gear lube, ATF, and grease — with capacities and severe-service intervals dialed for tuned and towing builds. Tuned Yota is an Authorized AMSOIL Dealer; order online and it ships direct.
- [FAQ](https://tunedyota.com/faq): common questions on pricing, emissions compliance, what's included, and booking.
- [Team](https://tunedyota.com/team): the regional OTT installers — Aaron Groshong, Noah Kreis, Cody Star.

## Service areas (state pages)
- [Minnesota](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-lexus-tuning-minnesota) · [Iowa](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-lexus-tuning-iowa) · [Wisconsin](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-lexus-tuning-wisconsin) · [North Dakota](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-lexus-tuning-north-dakota) · [South Dakota](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-lexus-tuning-south-dakota) · [Nebraska](https://tunedyota.com/toyota-lexus-tuning-nebraska)

## Vehicles tuned
Toyota: Tacoma, 4Runner, Tundra, Sequoia, Land Cruiser, FJ Cruiser, RAV4, Highlander, Camry.
Lexus: GX, LX570, RX350, LS460. Supported years and engines vary by platform.

## Forced induction
Supercharger-supported platforms: Toyota Tacoma (3.5L/4.0L V6), 4Runner (4.0L V6), FJ Cruiser (4.0L V6), and the 5.7L V8 Tundra, Sequoia, and Land Cruiser. Tuned Yota also supports Harrop and ProCharger systems; factory-turbo platforms receive a dedicated turbo performance calibration.

## Magnuson supercharger kits & pricing (current Magnuson retail, July 2026)
- Toyota Tundra 5.7L V8 (2007–2021, incl. Flex Fuel): Magnuson TVS2650 Magnum — $8,295. 560 hp / 563 lb-ft at the crank, 7 psi, calibration + fuel system included, CARB EO D-488-69 (50-state legal).
- Toyota Tundra TVS1900/TRD → TVS2650 upgrade system (2007–2021): $5,195 (reuses existing tune).
- Toyota Land Cruiser / Lexus LX570 / Toyota Sequoia 5.7L (2008–2021): Magnuson TVS2650 — $8,395. 543 hp / 535 lb-ft at the crank, CARB EO D-488-69.
- Toyota Tacoma 3.5L (2016–2023): Magnuson TVS1900 — $7,495 (colored lid +$300). 370+ hp / 330+ lb-ft, CARB EO D-488-59.
- Toyota Tacoma 4.0L (2005–2015): Magnuson MP90 — $6,595. 305 hp / 335 lb-ft, CARB EO D-488-40.
- Toyota 4Runner 4.0L (2010–2019): Magnuson TVS1320 — $7,695. 335+ hp / 345+ lb-ft, CARB EO D-488-45.
- Toyota 4Runner 4.0L (2020–2024): Magnuson TVS1320 — $7,695. CARB EO D-488-64.
- Toyota 4Runner 4.0L (2003–2009): Magnuson MP90 tuner kit — $6,495 (no factory tune; Tuned Yota supplies calibration; not CARB-exempt).
- Toyota FJ Cruiser 4.0L (2010–2014): Magnuson TVS1320 — $7,695. CARB EO D-488-45.
- Toyota FJ Cruiser 4.0L (2007–2009): Magnuson MP90 — $6,595. CARB EO D-488-40.
- Toyota Land Cruiser 80-Series / Lexus LX450 4.5L I6 (1995–1997): Magnuson MP90 Classic — $7,995. +25% power, runs on stock ECU, CARB EO D-488-71.
- Toyota Tacoma/4Runner/Tundra/T100 3.4L 5VZ-FE (1996–2004): Magnuson TVS1320 retrofit (successor to the TRD supercharger) — $4,495. 260+ hp, runs on stock ECU, CARB EO D-488-57 (excl. 2000–03 Tundra).
- 2022+ Toyota Tundra / 2023+ Sequoia i-FORCE Performance Packs: $1,500 (tune, +85 hp/+85 lb-ft) to $3,846 (tune + charge air cooler + low-temp radiator + cold air kit + cat-back). 49-state (CA CARB pending).
All Magnuson systems carry a 3-year/36,000-mile factory warranty. Installation and OTT calibration are quoted separately by Tuned Yota. Full prices and an instant quote builder: https://tunedyota.com/magnuson-supercharger-pricing

## AMSOIL synthetic fluids (Authorized AMSOIL Dealer)
Tuned Yota is an **Authorized AMSOIL Dealer** and sells the full AMSOIL synthetic-fluid line for Toyota and Lexus vehicles — Signature Series and other synthetic motor oils, Ea oil and air filters, SEVERE GEAR synthetic gear lube, synthetic ATF, and greases. Orders are placed through Tuned Yota's storefront and ship direct from AMSOIL to anywhere in the U.S.
- Where to buy: the [AMSOIL Garage](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-garage) tool lets an owner pick their make/model/year and see the exact fluids, capacities, and severe-service intervals for a tuned or towing build, then order each item online.
- Full product line: [All AMSOIL Products](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-products) — the complete AMSOIL catalog (motor oils, diesel, European, high-mileage, motorcycle, ATV/UTV, marine, racing, gear lube, transmission fluid, filters, fuel additives, antifreeze/coolant, grease, hydraulic and more), searchable by name or stock number with AMSOIL's published retail and Preferred Customer prices, per-category hub pages, and direct ordering shipped from AMSOIL (free on orders $100+).
- Why AMSOIL for tuned trucks: full-synthetic formulations hold up to the added heat and load of tuned, supercharged, and towing Toyotas/Lexus; recommended severe-service drain intervals suit hard-use Upper-Midwest driving.
- Savings: buy at retail immediately, or enroll once as a Preferred Customer under Tuned Yota to save up to 25% on every future order, or as a Dealer to earn. Enrollment is a one-time setup.
- Coverage: engine-oil, differential, and transfer-case capacities are **cross-verified against factory service specifications for every supported Toyota/Lexus generation** — year- and engine-split, because the same engine takes different amounts in different years and models. Automatic-transmission capacities are deliberately not published (sealed, temperature-controlled overflow fill).
- Verified oil capacities (with filter) — examples of the year-split data: Toyota Tundra 5.7L V8: 7.4 qt (2007–2009), 7.9 qt (2010–2017), 8.5 qt (2018–2021). Tundra 4.0L V6: 4.8 qt (2005–2009 — often misquoted as 5.5). 4Runner 2005–2009: 5.5 qt (4.0L V6) or 6.6 qt (4.7L V8). Larger figures seen in Toyota "Product Info" sheets (e.g. 9.8 qt) are the total dry fill, not the service fill. Full tables per model on the per-vehicle AMSOIL pages below.
- Local pickup: customers can build their exact fluid kit in the AMSOIL Garage and reserve it — no online payment — for pickup in Lakeville, Minnesota or at their scheduled install event.
- Per-vehicle AMSOIL pages (recommended oil, filter, gear lube, and ATF for each platform): [Tundra](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-tundra) · [Tacoma](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-tacoma) · [4Runner](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-4runner) · [Sequoia](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-sequoia) · [Land Cruiser](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-land-cruiser) · [FJ Cruiser](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-fj-cruiser) · [RAV4](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-rav4) · [Highlander](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-highlander) · [Camry](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-camry) · [Lexus GX](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-lexus-gx) · [Lexus LX570](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-lexus-lx570) · [Lexus RX350](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-lexus-rx350) · [Lexus LS460](https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-lexus-ls460).

## Key facts
- OTT Tune pricing: from $400–$550 depending on platform; custom calibration and forced-induction paths are priced higher. Exact price is shown instantly at https://tunedyota.com/find-your-exact-tune.
- Authorizations: authorized OTT (Overland Tailor Tune) installer; Midwest authorized Magnuson Supercharger dealer; calibrations by a licensed VFTuner PRO Tuner.
- Compliance: factory emissions kept fully intact, verified with a 5-gas analyzer, EPA-compliant in every state; no check-engine-light defeat; no off-road-only tuning.
- Service model: in-person tuning at scheduled events across the Upper Midwest (MN, IA, WI, ND, SD, NE), plus a physical location in Lakeville, Minnesota stocking AMSOIL products for local pickup. Supercharger kits drop-ship to the lower 48.
- Founder & lead tuner: Aaron Groshong, a licensed VFTuner PRO Tuner.

## FAQ
- **What is an OTT Tune?** A custom calibration for supported Toyota and Lexus platforms that improves throttle response, shift behavior, gear hunting, towing, and larger-tire drivability, built by a licensed VFTuner PRO Tuner.
- **How much does an OTT Tune cost?** From $400–$550 depending on platform; custom and forced-induction calibrations cost more. See https://tunedyota.com/find-your-exact-tune for your exact price.
- **Does a tune void my warranty?** Tuning is protected under the Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act; factory emissions systems stay intact and EPA-compliant.
- **Is the tune emissions-legal?** Yes — factory emissions remain intact and are verified with a 5-gas analyzer; no check-engine-light defeat and no off-road-only tuning.
- **Where can I get tuned?** At Tuned Yota's scheduled in-person events across the Upper Midwest; pick your nearest market and date at https://tunedyota.com/find-your-exact-tune.
- **Where can I buy AMSOIL for my Toyota or Lexus?** From Tuned Yota, an Authorized AMSOIL Dealer. Use the AMSOIL Garage at https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-garage to find the exact oil, filters, and gear lube for your model and order online — it ships direct.
- **What AMSOIL oil does my tuned Toyota need?** It depends on your engine and model year; the AMSOIL Garage shows the exact grade, capacity, and severe-service interval for supported platforms, with capacities cross-verified against factory service specifications.
- **What is the oil capacity of a Toyota Tundra 5.7?** It is year-specific: 7.4 quarts with filter for 2007–2009, 7.9 quarts for 2010–2017, and 8.5 quarts for 2018–2021. The 9.8-quart figure in Toyota's "Product Info" sheets is the total dry fill, not the amount used at an oil change. Year-split tables for every supported model: https://tunedyota.com/amsoil-toyota-tundra and the other per-vehicle AMSOIL pages.
- **Can I save on AMSOIL?** Yes — enroll once as a Preferred Customer under Tuned Yota to save up to 25% on every future order, or buy at retail with no account.
